title: To Ravennius, Bishop of Arles.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (He congratulates him on his appointment, exhorts him to firm but gentle government, and advises him frequently to consult the Apostolic See.
Undated, but no doubt sent about the same time as XL.)
